notes: v0.16.59 — RIFT class-confirm = floating popup (variant 2 SIDE + RIFT MEMO). After clicking OPEN RIFT the picker stays visible (dim backdrop) and an 880×560 popup appears with: BIG FLASHING 'PICK YOUR SHIP' header (chromatic + sin alpha pulse), left column of 4 class tiles (real CLASS data with mini ship silhouettes, click to select), right column with rift memo banner (difficulty + boss tier + stops/lives + LOCK warning + energy cost), big animated SkinAtlas ship preview (real per-class equipped skin), 2×3 EQUIPPED MODULES grid (real loadout via _class_loadout, hex icons + names + descs), and CANCEL · EDIT MODULES · OPEN RIFT buttons. Windows only.
